text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess hasn't shown up for training,
so I ask around before heading out to look for
her.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Look at these beefed up aesthetics! I can see why
King had such high praise for this art
exhibition! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ With this, I'm another step closer to
becoming the noblest of ladies, just like her.
choice_data_list:
I'm pretty sure King would never forget about
practice.

I'm pretty sure King would never forget about
practice.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, clearly! King would never do something so
stup—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer? What're you doing here? And
what's that about prac...tice?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ack! I-I-I had practice today, didn't I?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! It completely slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess seems truly remorseful about
her mistake. I warn her that while
self-improvement is all well and good, training
should be her top priority.
